mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending earnings contraction, triggering risk-off positioning that depresses equity prices over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC > 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between housing starts and consumer credit growth indicates conflicting demand signals; when housing accelerates while credit stagnates, it foreshadows a demand shock that reverses equity momentum.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient remains statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) across all out-of-sample test periods, or forward returns show no mean reversion after signal activation.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the industrial production index reflects robust manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side strength, which supports corporate margins and drives positive equity returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns in high INDPRO growth regimes do not exceed the median return by at least 1.5%, or the signal's predictive power decays to zero within 6 months.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth expands the aggregate earnings base, leading to higher forward equity returns as valuation multiples stabilize and cash flow growth dominates the pricing equation.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window, or forward returns show no correlation with GDP acceleration changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above the prevailing inflation rate, real borrowing costs turn positive and compress equity valuations, leading to negative forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Real rate spread signal fails to predict negative returns in > 50% of instances, or forward returns remain positive despite real rates exceeding 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous weakness in total nonfarm payrolls growth and rising unemployment creates a labor market feedback loop that anticipates a recessionary earnings drag, depressing equity prices over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to produce negative forward returns in > 60% of out-of-sample windows, or the interaction term's marginal effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp deceleration in industrial production relative to historical trends signals supply chain bottlenecks or demand destruction, which compresses profit margins and triggers negative equity returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: Weekly forward returns do not decline significantly following INDPRO deceleration triggers, or the signal's hit rate falls below 45% in walk-forward testing.
